questions.question: Ķ«?$A, B$ õĖ║ķÜÅµ£║õ║ŗõ╗? $P(A)=0.7, P(B)=0.5, P(A-B)=0.3$, Õł?$P(A B)=() ; P(B-A)=() ; P(\bar{B} \mid \bar{A})=()$.
questions.analysis:
$$
\begin{aligned}
& P(A B)=P(A)-P(A \bar{B})=P(A)-P(A-B)=0.7-0.3=0.4, \\
& \quad P(B-A)=P(B)-P(A B)=0.5-0.4=0.1, \\
& \quad P(\bar{B} \mid \bar{A})=\frac{P(\bar{A} \cap \bar{B})}{P(\bar{A})}=\frac{P(\overline{A \cup B})}{P(\bar{A})}=\frac{1-[P(A)+P(B)-P(A B)]}{1-P(A)}=\frac{2}{3} .
\end{aligned}
$$

µ│©µäÅ: $A-B=A \bar{B}=A-A B$.

questions.question: Ķ«?$A \subset B, P(A)=0.1, P(B)=0.5$, Õł?$P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B})+P(A \mid B)-P(A B)=()$.

$$
\begin{gathered}
P(A B)=P(A)=0.1, \quad P(A \mid B)=\frac{P(B A)}{P(B)}=0.2, \\
P(\bar{A} \cup \bar{B})=P(\overline{A B})=1-P(A B)=0.9,
\end{gathered}
$$

questions.question: Ķ«ŠķÜÅµ£║õ║ŗõ╗?$A$ õĖ?$B$ õ║ÆõĖŹńøĖÕ«╣, ÕĘ▓ń¤ź $P(A)=P(B)=a(0<a<1), P(A \mid \bar{B})=P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})$, Õł?$a, P(A \cup B)$ ńÜäÕĆ╝ÕłåÕł½õĖ║ ( ).
questions.analysis:
(1) ńö?$P(A \mid \bar{B})+P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1$, µ£?$P(A \mid \bar{B})=P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=0.5$, ÕåŹµĀ╣µŹ?$A, B$ õ║ÆõĖŹńøĖÕ«╣,
$$

$$

Ķ¦ŻÕć║ $a=\frac{1}{3}$;
(2) $P(A \cup B)=P(A)+P(B)=\frac{2}{3}$.

questions.question: Ķ«Šõ║ŗõ╗?$A$ õĖ?$B$ õ║ÆõĖŹńøĖÕ«╣, õĖ?$P(A)=\frac{1}{3}, P(B)=\frac{1}{4}$, ÕłÖµØĪõ╗Čµ”éńÄ?$P(A \mid \bar{B})=()$.

questions.question: Ķ«?$A, B$ õĖ║õĖżõ║ŗõ╗Č, $P(A)=0.7, P(B)=0.6, P(B \mid \bar{A})=0.4$, Õł?$P(A \cup B)=(\quad)$.

questions.question: ÕĘ▓ń¤ź $P(A)=\frac{1}{4}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{1}{2}, P(A \mid B)=\frac{1}{3}$, Õł?$P(A \cup B)=()$.

questions.question: Ķ«?$A, B$ µś»õĖżõĖ¬ķÜÅµ£║õ║ŗõ╗? $P(A)=0.4, P(A B)=0.2, P(A \mid B)+P(\bar{A} \mid \bar{B})=1$, Õł?$P(A \cup B)=()$.

questions.question: ÕĘ▓ń¤źÕĘ▓ń¤ź $P(A)=\frac{1}{2}, P(B)=\frac{5}{8}, P(B \mid A)=\frac{3}{4}$. Õł?$P(A \mid B)=()$.

questions.question: Ķ«?$A, B$ õĖ║õĖżõ║ŗõ╗Č, $P(A)=0.4, P(B)=0.8, P(\bar{A} B)=0.5$, Õł?$P(B \mid A)=()$.

questions.question: Ķ«?$A_1, A_2, B$ õĖ║õĖēõĖ¬ķÜÅµ£║õ║ŗõ╗? õĖ?$P(B)>0, A_1 \cap A_2=\varnothing$, Õł?$P\left(\overline{A_1} \cup \overline{A_2} \mid B\right)=()$.
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} P(\overline{A_1} \cup \overline{A_2} \mid B) &= P(\overline{A_1 \cap A_2} \mid B) = 1 - P(A_1 \cap A_2 \mid B) \\ &= 1 - P(\varnothing \mid B) = 1 - \frac{P(\varnothing \cap B)}{P(B)} \\ &= 1 - \frac{P(\varnothing)}{P(B)} = 1. \end{aligned}$

questions.question: ÕĘ▓ń¤ź $P(A \cup B)=0.8, P(B)=0.4$, Õł?$P(A \mid \bar{B})=()$.

$$
